title: tephrosia villosa var. ehrenbergiana
intro: Tephrosia villosa var. ehrenbergiana, also known as the African Bush Tea or Wild Tea, is a shrub native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia villosa var. ehrenbergiana include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and can be used to support immune function, reduce stress, and promote overall well-being.
